legacyjava/core/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
legacyjava/core/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 APIs and bytecode, failing to utilize Java 21 features or producing incompatible bytecode for a Java 21 runtime environment.

legacyjava/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the migration target.
legacyjava/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize or validate against Java 21 language features and APIs.
